title: Rmarkdown coding file used in Comparable Carbon Export Fluxes but Divergent Pathways across Contrasting N₂ Fixation Regimes (Savarino et al. 2026)
author: Savarino, Matthieu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the script used in the analyses presented in the article : Carbon Fluxes and Export Pathways Across Contrasting N₂ Fixation Regimes of the Oligotrophic Ocean (Savarino et al. 2026) . The data originate from the HOPE-04 (September 2024) and HOPE-06 (November 2024) cruises (https://doi.org/10.18142/330), as well as from the TONGA GEOTRACES GPpr14 expedition (November–December 2019) (https://doi.org/10.17600/18000884). The data originate comprehensively from CTD casts, gel-trap sediment trap imaging, chemical quantification by spectrometry from sediment trap samples, chemical quantification by spectrometry from ¹³C/¹⁵N incubation samples, qPCR quantification of targeted NifH genes (CTD-cast), and nutrient concentration measurements obtained using a bench-top autosampler (CTD-Cast).

The data originate comprehensively from CTD casts, gel-trap sediment trap imaging, chemical quantification by spectrometry from sediment trap samples, chemical quantification by spectrometry from ¹³C/¹⁵N incubation samples, qPCR quantification of targeted NifH genes (CTD-cast), and nutrient concentration measurements obtained using a bench-top autosampler (CTD-Cast).
